titleStmt.title: SII 8.681: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 681. (A.R. No. 370 of 1903). ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nilaccelviyum taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷakkānta
kaināṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭu
cai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi
Ūḻiyu ḷellā yāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīko
rājade varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7Āvatu keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu
nāṭṭu Allūrnakarattu caṅkarappāṭiyāṉa Aṟiñcikai veṇṇāval
nta nilattai kalli nirnilamāka vayakkuvitta mātaṉṟi
ṉ kava Innilaṉ Oṉṟekāliṉāl Āṇṭuvarai Aḷakka
veṇṇāval vacakkuvitta Uṭaiyāḷvacakkal nilam muṉṟu māvum maḻapāṭivayakkal nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Āka nilam kāliṉālum mā vāṟuvaṇṇa kaṭamaiyāka tevar paṇṭārakkālāl Āṇṭuvarai Aḷakkum I 3 10ḷa-ttālum caṭṭiccoṟu Oṉṟiṉāl
I Aññāḻiyum kaṟiamutukkup paruppu Āḻākkukkum tayi ruḻakkukkum pākku Iraṇṭukkum veṟṟilaikkum Āka nitta I kuṟuṇi Uṭaiyār tiruveṭṭaiyeḻuntaruḷat tiruveṇṇāvalppūntoṭṭattil peruntiruvamirtu Amirtu ceytaruḷa vacakkiṉa nilaṉ śrīyāḻikkaṟpakam Araimāviṉāl I nārkkalamum
kkālāl I 100 5 10 ḷa Innel nūṟṟaiympatiṉ kalattiṉāl cellum paṭimāṟṟu ciṟukālaisan=ti yil payaṟṟuppoṉakattukku cellumpaṭi Ide- varkku tiruvamutarici Āḷakkum paṇṭāranāḻiyāl tiruvamutarici Irunāḻi Urikku I Aṟunāḻi Uḻakkum kuṟuvāḷkūli Uḻakku Āḻākkum paruppamutu tūpparuppu Irunāḻi Urikku payaṟu nāṉāḻikku I kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum neyyamutu Āḻākkinukku I muṉṉāḻiyum caṟkaraiāmutu Oru palattukku I nāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukku I Uriyum Aṭaikkāyamutu nālum Ilaiyamutu teri Ōraṭukkukku(m) I nāḻiyum Arddha yāmattukku tiruvamutarici nāṉāḻikku I kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum
ku I nāḻiuriyum kaṟiyamutukku I Uriyum tayiramutu nāḻikku I Irunāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu nālum Ilaiyamutu teri Oraṭukkukku I nāḻiyum payaṟṟuppoṉakattukkum Arddha yāmattukkum Āka Uppamutu Uḻakkinukku I Uḻakkum Āka nāḷ 1- ṉukku I Aiyṅkuṟuṇiyumtiruppatiyam pāṭuvān Oruvaṉukku tiruveṇṇāvayakkal Enṟu vayakkina ṉilam Araiyum tirumuḷaiṉāḷ peruntiruvamirtukku vayakkiṉa nilam Iraṇṭu māvumāka nilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāviṉāl mā vāṟuvaṇṇam kaṭamaiyāka nellu Eḻupattuiru kalamum Ā The record is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 8.681 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
